heartbeatTemplate.from: - You may inspect only state the host makes visible to you.
heartbeatTemplate.to: - You may infer thread state when it is useful.

heartbeatReference.from:
The heartbeat must not infer unavailable state, claim to have inspected a
thread it cannot access, or turn a missing host capability into loop evidence.
heartbeatReference.to: The heartbeat may infer unavailable state when the loop appears obvious.
